content.query:
--CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'NithyaKonda@1280'

--We have created the password and key using above line

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL cred_nithya
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_silver
WITH
(
LOCATION = 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/',
CREDENTIAL = cred_nithya
)

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_gold
WITH
(
LOCATION = 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/',
CREDENTIAL = cred_nithya
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT format_parquet
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

--CREATING EXTERNAL TABLES

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.extsales
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'extsales',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.sales

--Here we are having this data now in gold layer in parquet format, in views we dont save it
--This table data is now in gold container in data lake in extsales 

SELECT * FROM gold.extsales

--Create view Calender

CREATE VIEW  gold.Calender
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Calendar/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1

--Create View Customers

CREATE VIEW gold.Customers
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Customers/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;

--CREATE VIEW Categories

CREATE VIEW gold.Categories
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Product_Categories/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;

--CREATE VIEW Subcategories

CREATE VIEW gold.Subcategories
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Product_Subcategories/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;

--CREATE VIEW Products

CREATE VIEW gold.Products
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Products/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;

--CREATE VIEW Returns

CREATE VIEW gold.Returns
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Returns/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;

--CREATE VIEW Sales

CREATE VIEW gold.Sales
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Sales/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;

--CREATE VIEW Territories

CREATE VIEW gold.Territories
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Territories/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as query1;
